'''Dorr-Femi-Bonmi''' was a [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who represented the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and served in the Cerean [[Council of Elders (Cerea)|Council of Elders]].

==Biography==
In [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], he was involved in a conspiracy with the [[Chevin/Legends|Chevin]] smuggler [[Ephant Mon/Legends|Ephant Mon]] to sell precious Cerean [[malium]] to [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] in exchange for banned technology, such as [[Swoop/Legends|swoops]]. Secretly, he played the movement for information and sold illegal Cerea technologies. Dorr was one of the only Elders on the Council in favor of joining the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], and expected the influx of technology to win the people in his favor. After the death of [[Ydde]], Dorr was arrested by his colleague [[Nar-Somo-Dali]] because of his corruption.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1998) 5|''Star Wars'' (1998) 5]] {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
